title: Aavesham
subTitle: Three boys move into a hostel to pursue engineering, where they clash with seniors. To get revenge, they befriend a gangster.

title: Carry On Jatta 3
subTitle: Jass, a lawyer's son, is in love with Meet, but the proposal is rejected by his father. However, he strives to win his lover's hand and devises a plan.

title: Ek Ultimate Chaalbaaz
subTitle: Arjun and his friends, small-time criminals, plan a big heist to help Arjun's girlfriend, Michelle. However, their plan goes awry, and they find themselves in serious trouble.

title: Filler
subTitle: Bringing the best in television.

title: Cobra
subTitle: Raja and Kari are fraternal twins. They end up in the home of a young single father with two daughters on their quest to find suitable brides.

title: Star Gold HD
subTitle: Shinda, a young man, plans a bank heist to gain quick money and marry his lover. However, his plans go haywire when he gets caught by the police.

title: Student of the Year
subTitle: Two best friends, Abhimanyu and Rohan, become fierce rivals while competing for a coveted title. Later, their bond further breaks when Abhimanyu falls for Shanaya, Rohan's girlfriend.

title: They Call Him OG
subTitle: An ex-mob boss resurfaces in Mumbai's underworld after a decade, hellbent on seeking revenge against the rival crime lords.

title: Phir Hera Pheri
subTitle: The lives of Raju, Shyam and Baburao change completely when they get cheated by a fraudster.Desperate to repay a loan from a feared gangster, they scramble to find an alternative solution.

title: Bhadrakaali
subTitle: Bringing the best in cinema.

title: Chhaava
subTitle: Following the death of Chhatrapati Shivaji Maharaj, his son, the Maratha king Sambhaji, takes a stand against the brutal Mughal emperor, Aurangzeb, in a bid to protect his empire.

title: Power Unlimited 2
subTitle: Karthikeya, a man who is devoted to his family, faces a huge challenge as his violent and turbulent past begins to resurface.

title: Power Unlimited 2
subTitle: Karthikeya, a man who is devoted to his family, faces a huge challenge as his violent and turbulent past begins to resurface.

title: Shiv Aur Sati Ki Mahagatha
subTitle: Shivdas, a devoted doctor and astrologer, overcomes life's challenges through unwavering faith in Lord Shiva, ultimately receiving divine blessings and salvation.

title: Housefull
subTitle: Aarush is an unlucky man and carries his bad luck wherever he goes. His quest to find love only makes his life more miserable as he ends up in complicated situations.

title: Baghban
subTitle: Raj and Pooja live an upsetting life when their sons refuse to reciprocate their affections and take care of them.

title: Gabbar Is Back
subTitle: The city's administration wrongs Aditya, a commoner. To avenge his tragedy, he disguises himself as a vigilante, Gabbar, and teams up with honest government officers to expose the corrupt.

title: Devara: Part 1
subTitle: A fierce sea warrior violently opposes his village's criminal activities, while years later, his gentle son charts his own course, creating a stark contrast in paths.

title: Tiger Zinda Hai
subTitle: RAW Agent Tiger joins forces with Zoya in order to rescue a group of nurses who are held hostage by a terrorist organisation.

title: Rajini The Jailer
subTitle: A retired jailer lives a peaceful life with his family. But when his son, who is a policeman, goes missing and is supposedly killed, he is forced to go back to his world of crime and find the killer.

title: Chakra Ka Rakshak
subTitle: A police officer and soldier team up and decide to end the cybercriminals that pose a threat to the safety of people on the Internet.

title: Chakra Ka Rakshak
subTitle: A police officer and soldier team up and decide to end the cybercriminals that pose a threat to the safety of people on the Internet.

title: Star Gold HD
subTitle: Shinda, a young man, plans a bank heist to gain quick money and marry his lover. However, his plans go haywire when he gets caught by the police.

title: Maatr
subTitle: A politician's son and his friends kidnap and sexually assault a school teacher, Vidya, and her daughter, Tia. After her daughter dies in the incident, the woman decides to take revenge.

title: Star Gold HD
subTitle: Star Gold HD

title: Mukti Bhawan
subTitle: Daya wishes to attain salvation in Varanasi and takes his son, Rajiv, along with him. As days pass, Daya finds a companion in a widow while Rajiv is left in a state of dilemma.

title: Guru
subTitle: A failed boxer sees potential in a vegetable seller and begins training her in boxing. However, the two don't get along due to the former's harsh training style.

title: Baaghi 2
subTitle: Ronny, a soldier, learns of the disappearance of the daughter of his former lover. Soon, his intense investigation leads him to uncover a web of crimes and a secret from the past.

title: The Family Star
subTitle: Govardhan, a diligent architect, longs for a partner who understands his commitment to his large family. When Indu, a new tenant, moves in, his life starts to unfold in a new direction.

title: Chup Chup Ke
subTitle: A fisherman saves Jeetu from committing suicide, only to sell him to a moneylender. Jeetu is then forced to pose as a man with hearing and speech impairment, resulting in hilarious consequences.

title: Shootout at Lokhandwala
subTitle: A notorious gangster rules over the Mumbai's underworld with an iron fist. However, his growing influence prompts a group of police officers to plot a strategy to clear the city of organised crime.

title: Rowdy Rathore
subTitle: Shiva's life takes an unexpected turn when a child mistakes him for her father. Upon learning the truth, Shiva vows to change his ways for the better.

title: Main Hoon Na
subTitle: Major Ram is given orders to go undercover as a college student to protect a general's daughter from a rogue soldier. He must also fulfil his dying father's desire to reconcile with his family.
